name: WaitingPeriods
description: Abortion waiting period restrictions in a US state, covering mandatory time between counseling and abortion care.

waiting_period_hours.description: Hours a person must wait between receiving state-mandated counseling and obtaining abortion. Null means no waiting period.

counseling_visits.description: 1=counseling required by state; 2=counseling must be at the facility, requiring two clinic trips.

exception_health.description: Conditions under which waiting period may be waived.

waiting_period_notes.description: Additional notes on unusual waiting period policies.
waiting_period_notes.example: Waiting period waived in medical emergencies.

counseling_waived_condition.description: Conditions under which counseling requirement can be waived.

Last Updated.description: Date this policy record was last updated.
